summary: Completed comprehensive testing of I Ching del Benessere MVP. All core functionality working correctly including user registration, login, subscription system, and consultation access control. Backend APIs fully functional (9/9 tests passed). Frontend UI properly displays Italian text and implements zen design.

ui_bugs.issue: DOM element detachment issue when switching back to Italian after English

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Italian text 'I Ching del Benessere'
User registration with name, email, password, language selection
User login with email and password authentication
Dashboard displays user info and subscription status correctly
Consultation access control - properly blocks without subscription
Language toggle switches to English successfully
History page shows empty state with call-to-action
